dsl_rule.translation_notes: Entry conditions: (1) Price at/above R1 resistance level using close >= r1. (2) Big move on previous two days approximated using returns > 0.02 (2% move). (3) Market closed at high and proceeded further approximated using prev_close >= prev_high to detect previous day's strength. No consolidation condition omitted as it requires pattern recognition beyond allowed operators. Exit: Close <= pivot (central pivot point). Expected move 60-70 points translates to ~2.5% stop loss on typical index levels. Hold period set to 5 days based on short-term reversion nature.

backtest_rule.reason: Entry conditions: (1) Price at/above R1 resistance level using close >= r1. (2) Big move on previous two days approximated using returns > 0.02 (2% move). (3) Market closed at high and proceeded further approximated using prev_close >= prev_high to detect previous day's strength. No consolidation condition omitted as it requires pattern recognition beyond allowed operators. Exit: Close <= pivot (central pivot point). Expected move 60-70 points translates to ~2.5% stop loss on typical index levels. Hold period set to 5 days based on short-term reversion nature.

source_rule_text: When price faces resistance at R1 after a big move on previous days with no consolidation, take a short trade from R1 towards the central pivot point.
